results.title: WYDOT reminds public of signage prohibition in state right-of-way
results.description: ROCK SPRINGS -- With the 2026 campaign season underway, the Wyoming Department of Transportation would like to remind political candidates, real estate representatives and residents advertising garage sales that posting signage within the right-of-way of interstate and rural highways is...

results.title: 9,000 Tooele County residents received wrong ballots, clerk says
results.description: County Clerk Tracy Shaw says Lt. Gov. Deidre Henderson’s office is helping them to “mass spoil/deactivate these incorrect ballots so that literally 0 of these will be counted in upcoming ballot processing.”

results.title: US Customs 'ready to go' at Gordie Howe Bridge once trade talks resolved
results.description: WASHINGTON — The Department of Homeland Security secretary confirmed this week that Customs & Border Protection staff are "good to go" to facilitate trade and travel across the newly built Gordie Howe International Bridge, once negotiations between Canada and the...

results.title: GOP Revives Immigration Bill
results.description: New York Times: “The Senate voted along party lines on Wednesday to take up Republicans’ $70 billion immigration crackdown bill, but several GOP senators suggested they would not allow it to pass without new language barring President Trump from creating a fund to compensate his political allies.” “The 53-to-46 vote began debate on legislation that [...]

results.title: Primary results for statewide seats take shape in California
results.description: As results trickle in and eyes are on some high-profile races in California, other statewide races are starting to take shape.

results.title: Senate begins voting on funding immigration enforcement after Trump’s settlement fund is dropped
results.description: The roughly $70 billion bill to fund US Immigration and Customs Enforcement and the Border Patrol was delayed for weeks as Republican senators navigated the various obstacles to passage.

results.title: GOP candidate focused on Mideast peace threatens California Democrats’ House redistricting goal
results.description: Michael Stansfield, a 50-year-old tech support worker, decided to run as a Republican in his congressional district in suburban Sacramento, California, to make a statement to the party's religious base.
